exporters.notes: Major source of zircon (and hence hafnium) ores are heavy mineral sands ore deposits, pegmatites particularly the Crown Polymetallic Deposit at Mount Weld, Western Australia.
Redirected supplies from European to Asian markets

exporters.ownership_note: AEM Metal, Shenzhen Zhonghafnium Technology Group
exporters.notes: Domestic consumption driven by semiconductor industry growth, export limitations
Maintains strategic reserves for defence applications
Dominates the nuclear-grade hafnium market, supplying control rods to reactors worldwide

importers.notes: Asian manufacturers quickly adapted their procurement strategies to capitalise on available Russian supplies
